description: Channel-agnostic paid-strategy audit. Detects every connected ad platform, researches unknown ones, produces a per-channel strategy brief plus alignment-check visualization, optionally synthesizes a cross-channel overall brief, installs a user.md instruction that reads briefs before answering performance questions, and schedules a Friday drift+ping routine.

installs.purpose: Main audit skill — channel detection, detective parsing, per-channel brief, alignment visualization, overall synthesis, drift routine, user.md install
Setup skill that asks for ping channels, user tags, and excluded campaigns
Pre-researched channel knowledge for Meta and TikTok. Other channels get auto-researched on first detection.
Local routing index for saved briefs
Global INDEX.md routing entry for the strategy library. The skills themselves are auto-discovered, intentionally not indexed.

runtime_installs.trigger: After the first successful audit for any workspace, idempotent across subsequent runs
runtime_installs.purpose: Standing instruction so future performance questions auto-read the channel-specific brief and use its validated-metric mapping — overriding workspace-goal and spend-threshold from the system prompt

post_install.name: Personalize for this workspace
post_install.description: Walk the user through ping-channel, user-tag, and excluded-campaign setup

post_install.name: Introduce the new capability
post_install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial release. Channel-agnostic — auto-detects Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, AppLovin, Snapchat, or any other connected ad platform. Auto-researches unknown channels and writes _channels/<channel>.md knowledge file before producing the brief. Detective-mode naming parser replaces token-vocabulary assumptions and works on structured, underscore-separated, or free-form names. user.md runtime install (runneth-apps:paid-strategy:read-before-performance v1) overrides workspace-goal and spend-threshold from system prompt. Friday drift+ping routine baked in. Pre-seeded channel knowledge for Meta and TikTok.
